blocking_issues: HostProfilesManagerScreen.kt:1165-1181 CompactCertIndicator collapses CertSlotStatus.Error into the Empty branch (paste icon + label only). Old CertImportSlot rendered s.message in error color + retry paste. Paste failures still set Error via triggerClientPaste/triggerCaPaste + decodeClientP12Import/decodeCaImport (MtlsDialogCallBuilders.kt:284-316) and dialogHasCertError disables Save/Test when mtlsEnabled, but the user never sees host_cert_err_base64/p12/ca. mtlsImportError is only cleared on success (applyClientP12ImportResult:347), never set on failure, so the mtlsBanner (875) does not compensate. Security-sensitive mTLS path: invalid PKCS12 (incl. OpenSSL-3+ AES guidance) becomes a silent 'Save disabled'. Must surface Error.message (inline under row / error-tinted indicator / mtlsImportError) before merge.
